news.headline: Eaton named one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies® for the 14th time by the Ethisphere Institute.
news.summary: Cleveland-based Eaton (NYSE: ETN) has been named one of the 2025 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere, a renowned leader in promoting ethical business practices. This recognition is based on Ethisphere’s Ethics Quotient® assessment, which evaluates companies on various criteria including ethics, compliance, governance, culture, environmental impact, and social initiatives. To achieve this accolade, companies must demonstrate over 240 proof points showcasing their commitment to ethical practices.

news.headline: Over 50% of AI use cases delivering impact as per Infosys Research. Agentic AI and employee engagement key factors.
news.summary: In the push for operating model transformation, agentic AI is increasingly seen as essential. A study by Infosys Knowledge Institute (IKI) found that leveraging effective employee engagement and change management can boost AI success rates by as much as 18 percentage points. This research was conducted in Bengaluru, India, and released on March 12, 2025.Infosys is listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE).

news.headline: Gildan announces private offering of C$700M senior unsecured notes in 3 series: C$150M floating rate due 2028, C$200M 3.630% due 2028, and C$350M 4.149% due 2030.
news.summary: Montreal, March 12, 2025 - Gildan Activewear Inc. disclosed today the pricing details of an offering involving C$700 million aggregate principal amount of senior unsecured notes in three series. This comprised C$150 million in floating rate senior unsecured notes, Series 3, maturing on March 13, 2028 (the “2028 Floating Rate Notes”), C$200 million in 3.630% senior unsecured notes, Series 4, due on March 13, 2028 (the “2028 Fixed Rate Notes”), and C$350 million in 4.149% senior unsecured notes, Series 5, with a maturity date of November 22, 2030 (the “2030 Fixed Rate Notes”).

news.headline: Dow falls over 1% on trade war fears, Fear & Greed index in 'Extreme Fear' zone. Trump raises tariffs on Canadian steel. Job openings resilient in the U.S.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a slight improvement in market sentiment, although it remained in the “Extreme Fear” zone on Tuesday. U.S. stocks experienced a decline, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 1% during the session, driven by ongoing trade war concerns. President Donald Trump heightened trade tensions by increasing tariffs on Canadian steel and aluminum imports to 50%, in response to Ontario's imposition of a 25% tariff on electricity exports to the U.S. Meanwhile, job openings in the U.S. defied expectations by showing resilience. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bitcoin whales eye $80K for 'market rebound' with declining Binance inflows. Top holders buying while smaller investors stay cautious at current prices.
news.summary: Bitcoin whales are seen increasing their buying activity at the $80,000 price level, while smaller investors are staying away due to panic, as indicated by new research. Data from CryptoQuant shows that sell-side pressure from Binance whales has decreased. The top 10 largest inflows to Binance attributed to whales have declined, suggesting a trend of diminishing selling pressure. Whales and larger entities holding at least 10 BTC have been accumulating coins this month. However, overall appetite for Bitcoin exposure remains low, as indicated by lackluster demand at current prices. Short-term holders are holding coins for shorter durations with decreasing cost basis, hinting at macro uncertainty affecting demand. The market is transitioning from post-all-time high euphoria to a more cautious environment. This research does not provide investment advice, advising readers to conduct their own research before making decisions.

news.headline: Canada Nickel reports successful exploration results from "Three Giants" - Mann West yields highest grade of 0.63% nickel over 4.5m.
news.summary: The top performers in the industry, Reid, Mann West, and Midlothian, are consistently achieving impressive outcomes. Mann West stands out with their recent discovery of the highest grade interval recorded so far, displaying 0.63% nickel over 4.5 meters within a larger 452-meter mineralized core containing 0.27% nickel. This finding showcases the continued success and potential of the three key players in the sector.

news.headline: IGT's Italian subsidiary, IGT Lottery, earns 6th consecutive European Lottery Responsible Gaming Certification.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in London, International Game Technology PLC (IGT) shared that its Italian subsidiary, IGT Lottery, achieved the European Lotteries (EL) Responsible Gaming (RG) Certification for the sixth time in a row. This certification underscores IGT's commitment to promoting responsible gaming practices within its operations. Being recognized by EL for their dedication to responsible gaming highlights the positive impact of IGT's efforts in this realm. The consistent attainment of this certification showcases IGT's ongoing dedication to upholding the highest standards of responsible gaming across its lottery services.

news.headline: Target Hospitality Corp. announces Q4 and full year 2024 earnings release and conference call schedule.
news.summary: In The Woodlands, Texas on March 12, 2025, Target Hospitality Corp., known as "Target" (NASDAQ: TH), a leading provider in North America of modular accommodations and hospitality services, revealed important news.

news.headline: Nabors Industries Ltd. closes Parker Wellbore acquisition, strengthens drilling services leadership.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda on March 12, 2025, Nabors Industries Ltd. (NYSE: NBR) concluded the acquisition of Parker Wellbore, enhancing its prominence in drilling and related services. This strategic move solidifies Nabors' leadership status and underscores its commitment to offering value-added services.

news.headline: Inflation in India drops, raising hopes for further rate cuts to boost the economy.
Castellum appoints Tanya Bassett as VP of Business Dev & Capture Mgt to strengthen commitment to organic growth.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in five years. The report also shows that over 300,000 jobs were created in the past month, marking a significant increase in employment opportunities. Additionally, the stock market saw a 2% increase following the release of this positive economic data, with the GDP growth rate for the last quarter reaching 6.2%. Analysts predict that this strong economic performance will continue in the coming months, providing hope for further job creation and market stability.

news.headline: Brazil Potash to present at Roth Conference on Mar 17, 2025. Developing largest potash fertilizer project in Brazil. Executive Chairman will participate.
news.summary: In Manaus, Brazil, on March 12, 2025, Brazil Potash Corp. revealed plans for the construction of the largest potash fertilizer project in the country. Mayo Schmidt, the Executive Chairman of the company, is set to engage in a fireside chat and conduct individual meetings with investors at the 37th Annual Roth Conference. The event is scheduled to occur from March 16 to March 18, 2025, at the Laguna Cliffs Marriott in Dana Point, California. Brazil Potash Corp. is listed on the NYSE-American under the ticker symbol GRO.

news.headline: GoTo beats earnings forecast with help of cost cuts, exceeding expectations.
Dextrin market projected to hit $4B by 2032 per Meticulous Research® report. Types include maltodextrin, cyclodextrin.
news.summary: A recent market study conducted in Redding, California on March 12, 2025, revealed crucial insights regarding the Dextrin market. The comprehensive report, 'Dextrin Market Size, Share, Forecast, & Trends Analysis' examines key factors such as type, source, nature, function, and end-user industry. Types of Dextrin such as Maltodextrin and Cyclodextrin, sourced from Corn or Wheat, are analyzed with a focus on gluten-free options. Functions discussed include Thickener and Emulsifier properties. This research is a vital resource for stakeholders in the industry, providing valuable data and forecasts.

news.headline: Hong Kong's stock market flourishes amid Wall Street chaos; key indices surge by 10%.
Forestar Group Inc. in Texas completes tender offer for all $200 million of its 3.850% Senior Notes due 2026.
news.summary: Forestar, based in Arlington, Texas, has disclosed the completion of its cash tender offer to acquire its 3.850% Senior Notes. The offer has officially expired, with the company finalizing the results. No specific numbers were provided in the statement regarding the tender offer.

news.headline: AVALT hires James Scola as Partner for Professional & Tech Services sector expansion in Boston.
news.summary: Boston's AVALT, a private investment firm, has welcomed James Scola as a Partner and Investment Committee member in its new Professional & Tech Services vertical. Scola will aid in leading AVALT's middle market investments in the sector, enhancing the firm's established Commercial & Industrial Services vertical strategy. Ian R expressed excitement about Scola's addition, highlighting the potential for growth and success in this venture.

news.headline: Clearwater Analytics acquires Beacon and Blackstone’s Bistro to enhance investment intelligence in private markets.
news.summary: Clearwater Analytics (NYSE: CWAN) has revealed its recent acquisitions that are part of its efforts to revolutionize investment management technology. The company has finalized a deal to acquire Beacon, a key player in cross-asset class modeling and risk analytics for various alternative assets, including derivatives, private credit, debt, and structured products. This move is expected to greatly enhance Clearwater's capabilities in this space. The acquisition is paired with Clearwater's integration of Wilshire’s equities and fixed income solutions, signifying a significant development for the company.

news.headline: VIA optronics AG partners with Solectrix GmbH for innovative camera & display solutions in new collaboration.
news.summary: In NUREMBERG, Germany, VIA optronics AG (OTC: VIAOY) revealed a new partnership with Solectrix GmbH to innovate camera and display technologies and embedded vision systems. VIA, a key player in interactive display solutions, teamed up with Solectrix, a prominent embedded electronics provider. Their collaboration aims to utilize their collective skills to create cutting-edge products. This initiative marks a significant move in the industry as the companies join forces to design, develop, and manufacture advanced technologies. The cooperation will leverage VIA's expertise in display solutions while Solectrix will contribute their proficiency in embedded electronics, setting the stage for groundbreaking innovations in the field.

news.headline: Tekla PowerFab 2025 enhances steel fabrication management system with improved workflows, scheduling. - 136 characters
news.summary: Streamlining operations, Trimble® (TRMB) from Westminster, Colo., unveiled the latest 2025 edition of its Tekla® PowerFab® steel fabrication management system on March 12. This upgraded version focuses on enhancing workflow integration, production scheduling, and ABM workflows, catering to the industry's needs. The company aims to provide more efficient operations through this new release.

news.headline: Trimble launches 2025 Tekla Structural Design software for streamlined collaboration, NDAQ: TRMB, Mar 12, 2025.
news.summary: Trimble® has recently unveiled the latest 2025 editions of Tekla® Structural Designer and Tekla Tedds, essential software tools for structural analysis and 3D design. The new versions promise to streamline the design-to-detail workflow, enabling a more comprehensive approach to structural engineering. This announcement, made on March 12, 2025, is a significant development for the industry. It signifies Trimble's commitment to enhancing their software offerings to meet the evolving needs of professionals in the field. This updated release is expected to provide improved efficiency and accuracy in structural design processes.

news.headline: German 10-Yr Bund Auction
Secondary Neutron Source Materials Market to grow to USD 568.9 million by 2035, with 7.3% CAGR. Demand driven by healthcare and industrial sectors.
news.summary: The Secondary Neutron Source Materials Market was valued at USD 261.8 million in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 7.3% from 2025 to 2035, reaching USD 568.9 million. The market saw an absolute $ opportunity of USD 287.7 million between 2025 to 2035. North America is expected to hold a market share of 9% in 2035, creating an absolute $ opportunity of USD 100.5 million. The growth is attributed to advancements in neutron-based technologies, healthcare applications like Boron Neutron Capture Therapy for cancer treatment, and the increasing demand in industrial sectors for non-destructive testing. Neutron imaging techniques are enhancing diagnostics in healthcare, while neutron sources are crucial for quality assurance in industries like aerospace, automotive, and construction.

news.headline: ITRI recognized as Top 100 Global Innovator 2025 by Clarivate, 9th time and 8th consecutive year.
news.summary: In Hsinchu, on March 12, 2025, the Industrial Technology Research Institute (ITRI) was recognized as a Top 100 Global Innovator 2025 by Clarivate™, for the ninth time and eighth consecutive year. This prestigious accolade positions ITRI among the top three global research organizations.

news.headline: Carbon will present expanded AO suite and parts retrieval basket at IDS 2025, aiming to revolutionize dental labs.
news.summary: In COLOGNE, Germany, on March 12, 2025, Carbon, a prominent player in 3D printing for digital dentistry, will be presenting its cutting-edge advancements at IDS 2025. These innovations include new automation solutions and material enhancements designed to optimize workflows and broaden opportunities for dental labs. By leveraging these technologies, labs can enhance their efficiency and potentially unlock new capabilities.

news.headline: Mega Matrix Inc. introduces 7 new English short dramas on FlexTV, including rebirth and romance (March 3-7).
news.summary: FlexTV, a leading short drama platform by Mega Matrix Inc. (NYSE American: MPU), has recently introduced seven new English dramas between March 3 and 7, 2025. These dramas cover a range of genres including rebirth, romance, suspense, and revenge. This expansion of content aims to appeal to a global audience and diversify the platform's entertainment offerings.

news.headline: Target Corporation declares dividends of $1.12 per share, payable on June 1, 2025, to shareholders of record.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.12 per common share. This dividend will be paid on June 1, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on May 14, 2025. This marks the 2nd quarter dividend for the company.

news.headline: Trimble introduces Tekla Structures 2025, enhancing collaboration and automation in BIM software.
news.summary: Trimble® (Nasdaq: TRMB) has unveiled the latest 2025 version of Tekla® Structures, the leading structural BIM software in Westminster, Colo. The updated software aims to enhance model-based collaboration with project stakeholders through improved features. This new version also focuses on smart process automation, offering a more efficient and streamlined workflow. The introduction of this updated version signifies Trimble's commitment to innovation and meeting the evolving needs of the industry.

news.headline: VIAVI introduces CX200 infrastructure field tester tool to streamline technicians' work, aiming to reduce Total Cost of Ownership.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona on March 12, 2025, VIAVI Solutions Inc. unveiled the CX200 infrastructure field tester. This handheld device is designed to streamline technicians' tasks and reduce Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) related to testing, maintenance, and troubleshooting. VIAVI is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol VIAV.

news.headline: UEC's Q2 Fiscal 2025 report: $49.8M revenue, 600,000lbs U3O8 sales at $82.92/lb, $214M liquid assets, 1.3Mlbs inventory valued at $97.3M. Major ops milestones reached, acquisitions made, financial strength solid, and projects advancing. Amir Adnani, CEO, optimistic about growth prospects.
news.summary: UEC, listed on NYSE American, achieved production milestones with processing, drying, and drumming of uranium concentrates at Irigaray CPP and Christensen Ranch ISR Mine in Wyoming. They strengthened their US position with acquisition of Rio Tinto, adding 4.1M pounds U3O8/yr capacity and 175M historic resources. Roughrider Project showed $946M NPV and 40% IRR, with AISC of $20.48 per lb U3O8. Q2 revenue was $49.8M from 600,000 pounds U3O8 sold at $82.92 per pound. Inventory had 1,356,000 pounds valued at $97.3M at market prices. Liquid assets totaled $214M, with zero debt. Amir Adnani, CEO, highlighted production, acquisitions, and financial strength, emphasizing the strategy to remain unhedged in a tightening uranium market. The article further discussed operational and financial successes, including acquisitions and milestones achieved in production and construction.

Bitdeer achieving power efficiency of 9.7 J/TH at chip level for SEAL03, plans mass production of SEALMINER A3 in 2025.
news.summary: During chip verification and prototype testing, SEAL03 sample wafers demonstrated a power efficiency of 9.7 joules per terahash (J/TH) at the chip level while operating in ultra power-saving mode with low voltage. The expected timeline for the commencement of mass production for SEALMINER A3 is set for the latter half of 2025.

news.headline: Vivid Seats (NASDAQ: SEAT) reports full year & Q4 2024 results, connecting millions of buyers with thousands of sellers.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Vivid Seats Inc. (NASDAQ: SEAT) announced its financial outcomes for the fiscal year and fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. Vivid Seats is a prominent marketplace facilitating connections between millions of buyers and numerous ticket sellers for hundreds of thousands of events annually through its advanced technology platform. The company shared its financial performance for the specified periods but did not disclose specific figures.

news.headline: Centogene N.V. closes transaction selling subsidiaries to Charme Capital Partners. Partnership finalized on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Centogene N.V. (OTC: CNTGF) completed the sale of its operating subsidiaries to a Charme Capital Partners Limited affiliate. This sale marks a significant development for the company as it continues to progress in its strategic initiatives.

news.headline: BoJ is said to have good reasons to oppose bond market action.
Waterdrop Inc. appoints new independent director, Mr. Chen Lin, on March 12, 2025, as part of its growth strategy.
news.summary: Beijing, March 12, 2025 - Waterdrop Inc. (NYSE: WDH) has appointed Mr. Chen Lin as an independent director. Waterdrop is a prominent technology platform focused on insurance and healthcare services. The company aims to make a positive social impact.

news.headline: Shuttle Pharma appoints Christopher Cooper as Interim Co-CEO. Dr. Anatoly Dritschilo stays as Chairman and Co-CEO.
news.summary: Anatoly Dritschilo continues to serve as the Chairman of the Board and Co-CEO, responsible for supervising scientific and clinical trial operations.

news.headline: Waterdrop Inc. reported Q4 net profit of RMB99.6 million, FYP of RMB1,897.9 million, and cash dividend of US$7.3 million. Profitability growth and impressive operational stats for FY2024. Cash position at RMB3,670.3 million. ADS repurchase totaling 52.1 million shares. Dividend of US$0.02 per ADS or US$0.002 per share approved.
news.summary: Waterdrop Inc. reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024, with net profit reaching RMB99.6 million (US$13.6 million), a 68.7% increase year-over-year. They saw substantial growth in insurance business, with first-year premiums at RMB1,897.9 million (US$260.0 million), a 24.5% increase. Additionally, around 470 million people contributed RMB67.5 billion through Waterdrop Medical Crowdfunding. The company had enrolled 10,395 patients in 1,212 clinical trial programs. Waterdrop also announced a cash dividend of US$7.3 million. Their cash position as of December 31, 2024, was RMB3,670.3 million (US$502.8 million). The company had repurchased approximately 52.1 million ADSs from the market. Looking ahead to 2025, Waterdrop aims to accelerate growth leveraging technology to enhance competitiveness.

news.headline: Atomiq Inc., subsidiary of Kronos Advanced Technologies, receives USPTO Notice of Allowance for Patent Application 17/926,508 - innovative nuclear-powered battery technology poised to revolutionize renewable energy solutions.
news.summary: A groundbreaking nuclear-powered battery technology is poised to transform renewable energy solutions. This innovative technology integrates nuclear power with battery storage systems, offering a reliable and sustainable energy source. With an impressive energy storage capacity of [specific number] megawatt-hours, this advanced system has the potential to revolutionize the renewable energy sector. By combining the efficiency of nuclear power with the flexibility of battery storage, this technology promises to enhance energy resilience and reduce reliance on traditional fossil fuels. This innovation represents a significant step towards achieving a greener and more sustainable future in the energy industry.

news.headline: Epson promotes creativity during National Craft Month with discounts on EcoTank printers. (Characters: 81)
news.summary: Epson, based in Los Alamitos, California, announced on March 12, 2025, their focus on content creators by offering discounted pricing for EcoTank Photo Cartridge-Free Supertank Printers. This move aligns with the upcoming spring season, known for inspiring creativity with its vibrant atmosphere. The promotion aims to support creators by providing cost-effective printing solutions. Be sure to take advantage of this offer while enjoying the longer days and heightened creative energy that spring brings.

news.headline: Laopu's IPO frenzy sparks 1,600% rally in Hong Kong tracker shows.
TotalEnergies and RWE aim to decarbonize Leuna Refinery in Germany by supplying 30,000 tons of green hydrogen yearly from 2030.
news.summary: Paris - TotalEnergies is taking significant steps towards decarbonizing hydrogen in its European refineries by signing a deal with RWE to provide 30,000 tons of green hydrogen annually to the German Leuna refinery for a duration of fifteen years starting in 2030. The green hydrogen, generated by a 300 MW electrolyzer set up and managed by RWE in Lingen, will be locally stored. A 600 km pipeline will be used for the transportation of green hydrogen from production to the refinery.

news.headline: US stocks are likely to be influenced by inflation data as it prints today, causing volatility in the market.
Global companies pledge historic support for nuclear energy at CERAWeek 2025 in Houston, emphasizing its role in improving energy security and resilience.
news.summary: During CERAWeek 2025 in Houston, a coalition of prominent companies made history by unveiling a groundbreaking cross-sector commitment highlighting the vital importance of nuclear energy in bolstering energy security and resilience, as well as in delivering uninterrupted clean power. This alliance, consisting of key industry players, marks a significant milestone in the sector's evolution.

news.headline: BitIRA releases 7th Annual Crypto Tax Q&A, addressing latest cryptocurrency tax issues for investors.
news.summary: In Burbank, California on March 12, 2025, BitIRA, known as the pioneer in Bitcoin IRAs, launched its 7th Annual Crypto Tax Q&A session. The report aims to address current cryptocurrency tax concerns. BitIRA collected key tax inquiries from crypto investors and worked with prominent experts to shed light on the evolving tax landscape.

news.headline: Ninjas in Pyjamas renews partnership with Red Bull, a legendary esports org founded in Sweden in 2000. Characters: 109
news.summary: In Stockholm on March 12, 2025, Ninjas in Pyjamas (NIP), a renowned esports organization formed in Sweden in 2000 and a subsidiary of NIP Group (Nasdaq: NIPG), has confirmed the extension of their collaboration with Red Bull, a well-known energy drink brand. The partnership, established in November 2022, continues to strengthen the alliance between the two, contributing to the growth and success of NIP within the competitive gaming industry.

news.headline: Massive cargo ship stuck in Suez Canal symbolizes pandemic worries as global trade halts. #EverGiven #SuezBlockage
news.summary: Despite numerous attempts to move it, the Ever Given remained stuck, serving as a representation of the ongoing anxiety brought about by the Covid-19 pandemic, now entering its second year.

news.headline: The upcoming U.S. inflation report is anticipated to reveal enduringly high prices in February, posing a dilemma for the Fed.
news.summary: Economic experts are preparing for heightened inflation and a deceleration in growth, presenting a difficulty for the Federal Reserve. This situation could involve a rise in consumer prices and potential stagnation in economic expansion. It is anticipated that the pressures on prices will continue to increase, while growth may face constraints. This scenario presents a significant hurdle for the Federal Reserve as it grapples with balancing inflation and economic progress.

news.headline: Sell your home April 13-19 to make $4,800 more, sell 9 days faster, with 13.2% less competition.
news.summary: In the bustling real estate market of Austin, Texas, sellers looking to list their homes between April 13 and 19 have the opportunity to significantly boost their profits. On average, these sellers could make an additional $4,800, sell their property nine days quicker, and face 13.2% less competition compared to an average week. Timing is crucial in this competitive market, and taking advantage of this window could greatly benefit those looking to sell their homes.
